type._role: GPU uniform renamed type->noiseType because 'type' is a WGSL reserved keyword.

power._role: Mandelbulb spherical-coordinate exponent; for Mandelbox repurposed as the scale parameter.

seed._role: Bound to the GPU as f32 (WGSL var<uniform> seed: f32); the HLSL declares 'float seed'.

volumeCache._role: VOLUME atlas (2D RenderTexture 64x4096 = 64 slices of 64x64). MRT SV_Target0 (color). Holds the camera-relative fractal density field: r=normalizedDist, g=trap, b=iterRatio, a=1. Atlas (u,v)->(vx,vy,vz): vx=px.x, vy=px.y%volumeSize, vz=px.y/volumeSize. Raymarched downstream by render3d/renderLit3d.

geoBuffer._role: GEO buffer atlas (same 64x4096 layout). MRT SV_Target1 (geoOut): xyz = normal*0.5+0.5 (encoded surface normal), w = normalizedDist (depth/density). Bounds-rejected voxels write (0.5,0.5,0.5,0.0).

render3d._comment: 3D / RENDER tier VOLUME GENERATOR. Single pass 'precompute' is a fullscreen draw over the volume atlas RenderTexture (64x4096, rgba16f). The render target dimensions ARE the atlas dims, so the runtime sets the pass viewport to {width:volumeSize, height:volumeSize^2} and binds TWO MRT color attachments (drawBuffers:2): volumeCache (SV_Target0/color) and geoBuffer (SV_Target1/geoOut). Each atlas texel maps to a (vx,vy,vz) voxel via the WGSL mapping (vx=fragCoord.x, vy=fragCoord.y%volumeSize, vz=fragCoord.y/volumeSize); the fragment samples camera-relative fractal world space and writes density + encoded normal/depth. NM_FragCoord uses _NM_Resolution.xy = the atlas size (NOT screen) since the atlas is the render target; tileOffset/fullResolution are NOT used by the voxel math. This effect performs NO raymarch — a downstream render3d/renderLit3d effect (separate definition) raymarches volumeCache+geoBuffer into a 2D image. The volume defaults: volumeSize=64 (atlas 64x4096), with x16/x32/x64/x128 choices producing 16x256 / 32x1024 / 64x4096 / 128x16384 atlases respectively. 'time' is the engine global (normalized 0..1). 'seed' is bound as f32. NO feedback/state surfaces (the atlas is fully regenerated each frame). NO drawMode/count/repeat. Per reference 04 §8: vol0..7 are the user volume surfaces; the runtime maps outputTex3d->vol slot and outputGeo->geo slot.
